headline: Stryker (SYK) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Stryker (SYK) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: TMO Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Stock Down in Pre-Market
summary: TMO beats Q1 EPS and revenue estimates with steady growth, yet shares slip 4% in pre-market after results and mixed segment performance.
